title: Method for treating the surface of moulded parts
abstract: A method is for treating a surface of a molded part produced according to a 3D printing method using a plastics material. A solvent is selected from the group consisting of halogen-free and non-polar hydrocarbons and derivatives thereof and/or a solvent selected from the group consisting of bio-based solvents and is applied to the surface of the molded part. A device is for treating a surface according to the method described.
claims: 1. Method for treating a surface ( 11 ) of a molded part ( 10 ) produced according to a 3D printing method using a plastics material, wherein a solvent selected from the group consisting of bio-based solvents is applied to the surface ( 11 ) of the molded part ( 10 ), wherein the bio-based solvent is 1,8-Cineole.
